category_title: Eighth-grade students with ASD displaying low academic engagement and task avoidance in math
scenario_title: Low academic engagement during math class activities
minimal_context: The student is expected to complete practice problems in a peer-supported group during fourth-period math class.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: It is time to complete the practice problems with your peer-supported group.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Does not follow the directions within 10 seconds and begins doodling on the desk instead.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please start working on the math assignment.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: No, I am not doing the work.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You need to do the practice problems with your group.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Puts head down on the desk and pulls out a book to read instead of looking at the math assignment.)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: It is time to complete the practice problems with your peer-supported group.

STUDENT: (Does not follow the directions within 10 seconds and begins doodling on the desk instead.)

TUTOR: Please start working on the math assignment.

STUDENT: No, I am not doing the work.

TUTOR: You need to do the practice problems with your group.

STUDENT: (Puts head down on the desk and pulls out a book to read instead of looking at the math assignment.)

task.content: Completing an introductory warm-up activity, taking notes, completing practice problems in peer-supported groups, and beginning homework assignments

context.materials: Assignments, non-math tasks (e.g., reading a book, doodling materials), checklist, agreed upon reinforcer
context.time_context: Fourth period each day, during the allotted time

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: During instruction or group work when expected to complete assignments during the allotted time
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Verbally refusing to do work, putting head down, not following directions within 10 s, and engaging in non-math tasks (e.g., reading a book, doodling)

behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Verbally refusing to do work, putting head down, and engaging in non-math tasks (e.g., reading a book, doodling)
